subheadings.heading: SecLists: The Industry Standard
content: # Critical Raft paths for directory discovery

subheadings.heading: Specialized Bug Bounty Lists
content: [Assetnote Wordlists](https://wordlists.assetnote.io/) - Real-world data from HTTP Archive and certificate transparency.
[OneListForAll](https://github.com/six2dez/OneListForAll) - Unified wordlist for rapid multi-vector fuzzing.

subheadings.heading: Directory & Asset Discovery
subheadings.content:
| Use Case | Recommended Wordlist | Path Reference |
|---|---|---|
| **Quick Scan** | common.txt | `Discovery/Web-Content/common.txt` |
| **Standard** | raft-medium-directories.txt | `Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt` |
| **Thorough** | directory-list-2.3-big.txt | `Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-big.txt` |
| **API/REST** | api-endpoints.txt | `Discovery/Web-Content/api/api-endpoints.txt` |

subheadings.heading: Password & Authentication
subheadings.content:
| Context | Recommended List | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **Classic Crack** | rockyou.txt | 14M entries; the universal baseline. |
| **Password Spray** | 10k-most-common.txt | High-probability targets for spraying. |
| **Default Creds** | betterdefaultpasslist.txt | Curated lists for SSH, FTP, Tomcat. |
| **Subdomains** | subdomains-top1million.txt | Top targets from 1M dataset. |

subheadings.heading: Vulnerability-Specific Fuzzing
content: **XSS (Jhaddix)**: `Fuzzing/XSS/XSS-Jhaddix.txt` - Comprehensive polyglot and bypass payload set.

content: # Extract words (min 5 chars) from target with depth 2

subheadings.heading: Rule-Based Mutation (Hashcat)
content: # Generate mutated wordlist using best64 rules

subheadings.heading: High-Throughput Resolution
content: [Trickest Resolvers](https://github.com/trickest/resolvers) - Automatically updated list of verified public resolvers.
[dnsvalidator](https://github.com/vortexau/dnsvalidator) - Tooling to verify and remove stale resolvers before high-scale enumeration.

sections.heading: Quick Reference Size Matrix
sections.content:
| Task | Recommended Wordlist | Entries |
|---|---|---|
| **Web Fuzzing** | common.txt | 4.7K |
| **Password Spray** | 10k-most-common.txt | 10K |
| **Subdomain Enum** | subdomains-top1m-20000.txt | 20K |
| **Directory Brute** | raft-medium-directories.txt | 30K |
| **Pass Cracking** | rockyou.txt | 14M |
